title: Senior Financial Analyst - Angel One - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Angel One - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Angel One in Kanpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!
